rationale_top3: Unbeatable beachfront location with direct beach access and walking distance to Byron Bay attractions Strong nature experience with wildlife encounters and dolphin watching opportunities from the bay Dog-friendly facilities with nearby off-leash beach access within 10-minute walk
rationale_honourable: Family-friendly atmosphere with kids able to safely use scooters throughout the park Provides functional base camp for surfing and exploring Byron Bay's coastal walks and lighthouse
water_fun: No major water-based facilities evident on-site, but proximity to Byron Bay's world-famous beaches provides excellent ocean swimming and water activities nearby
kids_play: Basic children's facilities with limited entertainment infrastructure - families may need to rely on nearby Byron Bay attractions for children's activities
pet_detail: No evidence of pet-friendly accommodation - appears pets are not permitted at this park
best_for: Location-focused travelers who prioritize being close to Byron Bay's beaches and town over extensive on-site amenities
